name: WF-LeadFollowup

parameters.subject: Thanks for your enquiry — Bendigo Fight Centre
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.body.name }},

Thanks for getting in touch with Bendigo Fight Centre!

We've received your enquiry{{ $json.body.interest ? ' about ' + $json.body.interest : '' }} and Kaleb will be in touch within 24 hours.

In the meantime, feel free to check out our timetable:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/timetable

Or book a free trial class:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/join

Talk soon,
The BFC Team

parameters.subject: =Still thinking about joining BFC, {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}?
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

Just following up on your enquiry from a few days ago.

Have you had a chance to check out the timetable? We'd love to get you in for a free trial class — no commitment, just come and give it a go!

📅 View timetable: https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/timetable
🥊 Book free trial: https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/join

Any questions, just reply or give us a call.

Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre

parameters.subject: =Last one from us, {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

Last email from us — we don't want to hassle you!

If you're ever keen to give training a go, the door is always open:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/join

We offer BJJ, boxing, Muay Thai, wrestling and MMA — first trial class is free.

Hope to see you on the mats sometime.

Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre

parameters.subject: =BFC — {{ $json.body.leads_flagged || 0 }} cold leads flagged for follow-up
parameters.message:
=The daily lead follow-up check has flagged cold leads in your CRM pipeline.

Leads not contacted in {{ $json.body.cold_threshold_days || 3 }} days have been automatically moved to 'follow_up_required' stage and tasks have been created.

Review your pipeline:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/leads

View open tasks:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/dashboard

notes:
SETUP:
1. Connect your Gmail account in Credentials
2. Set N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variable in n8n (Settings → Variables)
3. Copy this workflow's webhook URL and paste into N8N_LEAD_FOLLOWUP_WEBHOOK_URL in Vercel
4. Activate the workflow

Two modes:

mode=new_lead (triggered by chatbot/contact form/inbound email):
  Payload: { lead_id, name, email, phone, source, interest, mode: 'new_lead' }
  Sends 3-email sequence: immediate auto-reply, day 3, day 7

mode=cold_leads (triggered daily by WF-ColdLeads schedule):
  Payload: { mode: 'cold_leads', cold_threshold_days: 3, leads_flagged: N }
  Notifies Kaleb that X leads have been flagged (tasks already created by platform)
